allow: PowerShell($urls = @\("https://res.cloudinary.com/lambert-remolques/image/upload/adicionales/piso-superficie/tinteros/foto-1.jpg","https://res.cloudinary.com/lambert-remolques/image/upload/adicionales/piso-superficie/tinteros/foto-1.png","https://res.cloudinary.com/lambert-remolques/image/upload/adicionales/tinteros/foto-1.jpg"\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -Method Head -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "OK \($\($resp.StatusCode\)\): $u" } catch { Write-Output "FAIL \($\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)\): $u" } })
